name: IdsEdwAltFundPlnDLoad

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT ALT_FUND_PLN_SK,SRC_SYS_CD,ALT_FUND_PLN_ROW_ID,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,ALT_FUND_SK,CLS_PLN_SK,GRP_SK,SUBGRP_SK,ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_CD,ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_NM,ALT_FUND_CNTR_PERD_NO,ALT_FUND_ID,ALT_FUND_NM,ALT_FUND_UNIQ_KEY,CLS_PLN_ID,GRP_ID,SUBGRP_ID,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.S2B1_TMP_IdsEdwAltFundPlnDLoad) UPDATE T SET T.SRC_SYS_CD=O.SRC_SYS_CD,T.ALT_FUND_PLN_ROW_ID=O.ALT_FUND_PLN_ROW_ID,T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK=O.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,T.ALT_FUND_SK=O.ALT_FUND_SK,T.CLS_PLN_SK=O.CLS_PLN_SK,T.GRP_SK=O.GRP_SK,T.SUBGRP_SK=O.SUBGRP_SK,T.ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_CD=O.ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_CD,T.ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_NM=O.ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_NM,T.ALT_FUND_CNTR_PERD_NO=O.ALT_FUND_CNTR_PERD_NO,T.ALT_FUND_ID=O.ALT_FUND_ID,T.ALT_FUND_NM=O.ALT_FUND_NM,T.ALT_FUND_UNIQ_KEY=O.ALT_FUND_UNIQ_KEY,T.CLS_PLN_ID=O.CLS_PLN_ID,T.GRP_ID=O.GRP_ID,T.SUBGRP_ID=O.SUBGRP_ID,T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK=O.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,T.ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_CD_SK=O.ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_CD_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.ALT_FUND_PLN_D T JOIN cte O ON T.ALT_FUND_PLN_SK=O.ALT_FUND_PLN_SK; INSERT INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.ALT_FUND_PLN_D(ALT_FUND_PLN_SK,SRC_SYS_CD,ALT_FUND_PLN_ROW_ID,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,ALT_FUND_SK,CLS_PLN_SK,GRP_SK,SUBGRP_SK,ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_CD,ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_NM,ALT_FUND_CNTR_PERD_NO,ALT_FUND_ID,ALT_FUND_NM,ALT_FUND_UNIQ_KEY,CLS_PLN_ID,GRP_ID,SUBGRP_ID,CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_CD_SK) SELECT O.ALT_FUND_PLN_SK,O.SRC_SYS_CD,O.ALT_FUND_PLN_ROW_ID,O.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,O.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK,O.ALT_FUND_SK,O.CLS_PLN_SK,O.GRP_SK,O.SUBGRP_SK,O.ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_CD,O.ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_NM,O.ALT_FUND_CNTR_PERD_NO,O.ALT_FUND_ID,O.ALT_FUND_NM,O.ALT_FUND_UNIQ_KEY,O.CLS_PLN_ID,O.GRP_ID,O.SUBGRP_ID,O.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,O.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK,O.ALT_FUND_CLS_PROD_CAT_CD_SK FROM cte O LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.ALT_FUND_PLN_D T ON T.ALT_FUND_PLN_SK=O.ALT_FUND_PLN_SK WHERE T.ALT_FUND_PLN_SK IS NULL
